titles.title: Jesus Came Down to Fight For Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He was worshipped in heaven Receiving honor, glory and praise Before there was a creation, I was locked up in Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Up there, I fought with Michael When that old dragon Was kicked out of heaven Here I'm now in this terrestrial body Looking back at my victory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And He looked at me Jesus saw I was in need Fighting this battle of good over evil So He descended to fight for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My Jesus descended! Seven angels were seen in the cloud He has established His throne in my heart. Now all those devils are under my feet. Just when the enemy, Thought he'd destroy me. Jesus came down to fight for me.
